originalTitle: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
title: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
content: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.

originalTitle: Nigeria drops terrorism financing charges against ex-justice minister
title: Nigeria drops terrorism financing charges against ex-justice minister
content: Abubakar Malami was seen as one of the most influential ministers under former President Muhammadu Buhari.

originalTitle: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
content: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

originalTitle: Peru’s ballot count drags on amid frustration with presidential election
title: Peru’s ballot count drags on amid frustration with presidential election
content: The turbulent election has prompted fraud claims by candidates and frustration with the country's chaotic politics.

originalTitle: Israel bombs homes in southern Lebanon
title: Israel bombs homes in southern Lebanon
content: The Israeli army has bombed buildings in southern Lebanon’s Bint Jbeil district.

originalTitle: Brazil’s police open a probe into presidential candidate Flavio Bolsonaro
title: Brazil’s police open a probe into presidential candidate Flavio Bolsonaro
content: Investigation centres on whether Bolsonaro committed defamation by linking Lula to crimes like drug trafficking.

originalTitle: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
title: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
content: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.

originalTitle: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
title: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
content: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.

originalTitle: Frank Gardner: What is China's role in the Iran war?
title: Frank Gardner: What is China's role in the Iran war?
content: BBC Security Correspondent Frank Gardner explains how the world's second-largest economy fits into the Gulf conflict.

originalTitle: Seven goals, fastest strike & two red cards - Bayern-Real delivers drama
title: Seven goals, fastest strike & two red cards - Bayern-Real delivers drama
content: The quickest strike in this season's Champions League, seven goals, two red cards and the competition's 15-time winners exiting in anger - once again the knockout stages of European club football's elite contest has delivered drama in spades.

originalTitle: Real Madrid set for rare trophyless season - will Arbeloa pay the price?
title: Real Madrid set for rare trophyless season - will Arbeloa pay the price?
content: After losing out to Bayern Munich in a thrilling Champions League quarter-final, Real Madrid face the prospect of a trophyless season that could cost Alvaro Arbeloa his job.

originalTitle: Ekitike to miss rest of season and World Cup - Deschamps
title: Ekitike to miss rest of season and World Cup - Deschamps
content: France manager Didier Deschamps confirms striker Hugo Ekitike will miss the rest of the season and World Cup after suffering a suspected Achilles injury during Liverpool's Champions League quarter-final defeat by Paris St-Germain on Tuesday.
